metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

ECON-H001.title: Isolate Liquidation Sends NFT to Caller Instead of Winning Bidder - Free NFT Theft
ECON-H001.duplicate_group_description: Isolate liquidation transfers NFT to caller (params.msgSender) instead of the highest bidder (loanData.lastBidder), enabling anyone to steal auctioned NFTs using the bidder's escrowed funds

ECON2-H009.title: Flash Loan ERC20 Reentrancy Enables Borrowing at Manipulated Interest Rates
ECON2-H009.duplicate_group_description: flashLoanERC20 intentionally omits nonReentrant modifier and does not update availableLiquidity during the loan, enabling reentrancy during callback to manipulate interest rates and protocol state using stale inflated liquidity

ECON2-H010.title: IsolateRedeem Decreases Wrong User's Borrow Balance Enabling Debt Theft
ECON2-H010.duplicate_group_description: executeIsolateRedeem decreases isolate borrow balance of params.msgSender instead of the actual borrower (tokenData.owner), corrupting per-user debt accounting and enabling third-party debt reduction

TECH-H004.title: Native Token Deposit/Repay/Bid Flows Broken Due to WETH Approval Requirement After Wrap
TECH-H004.duplicate_group_description: Native token wrap/unwrap helpers use transferFrom incorrectly: wrapNativeTokenInWallet uses transferFrom(self, user) instead of transfer, and unwrapNativeTokenInWallet requires user WETH approval, breaking all native ETH deposit/repay/borrow/liquidation flows

TECH-H017.title: Native ERC20 withdrawal path unwraps using the original requested amount (not the capped/actual withdrawn amount), causing reverts or unintended extra WETH pull from msgSender
TECH-H017.duplicate_group_description: BVault.withdrawERC20 passes original uncapped amount to unwrapNativeTokenInWallet after executeWithdrawERC20 may have internally capped it to userBalance, causing native ETH full-withdrawal patterns to revert

ECON2-H011.title: ERC721 Flash Loan Bypasses lockerAddr Check Allowing Extraction of Yield-Locked NFTs
ECON2-H011.duplicate_group_description: executeFlashLoanERC721 checks tokenData.owner but does not check tokenData.lockerAddr, allowing flash-loaning of NFTs locked by yield managers or isolate lending, bypassing lock guarantees

TECH-H007.title: Flash Loan ERC20 Bypasses availableLiquidity Tracking and Can Access Bid Escrow Funds
TECH-H007.duplicate_group_description: Flash loan ERC20 transfers bypass availableLiquidity validation, allowing flash loans to access bid escrow funds (totalBidAmout) and temporarily violating solvency invariants

OPS-H007.title: Fee Collection Order-of-Operations Bug - Treasury Receives Slightly Inflated Supply Shares
OPS-H007.duplicate_group_description: executeCollectFeeToTreasury reads and zeros accruedFee before calling updateInterestIndexs, causing order-of-operations errors in fee collection timing and share calculation

TECH-H009.title: Flash Loan ERC20 Missing Balance Delta Verification Enables Token Drain with Fee-on-Transfer Tokens
TECH-H009.duplicate_group_description: Flash loan ERC20 transfer functions (erc20TransferOutOnFlashLoan/erc20TransferInOnFlashLoan) lack pre/post balance delta verification, enabling value drain with fee-on-transfer tokens

OPS-H009.title: Cross Liquidation ERC721 - Incorrect collateralItemDebtToCover Division Creates Rounding Exploit for Multi-NFT Liquidation
OPS-H009.duplicate_group_description: Cross liquidation ERC721 per-item debt calculation uses integer division truncation (collateralTotalDebtToCover / userCollateralBalance) causing systematic underpayment by liquidators

ECON2-H015.title: rayMul/rayDiv Rounding Asymmetry Can Prevent Full Debt Repayment in Liquidation
ECON2-H015.duplicate_group_description: rayMul/rayDiv rounding asymmetry causes amountScaled to exceed original userScaledCrossBorrow/userScaledCrossSupply by 1 wei during full debt repayment or liquidation, causing underflow reverts and potentially unliquidatable positions

ECON2-H016.title: Isolate Auction First Bid Minimum Equals Borrow Amount Creating Permanent Bad Debt
ECON2-H016.duplicate_group_description: Isolate auction first bid must be >= borrowAmount, making underwater NFT positions (debt > market value) permanently unliquidatable, creating systemic bad debt

ECON-H020.title: Malicious bidders can permanently lock isolate auctions using reverting fallbacks or blocklists
ECON-H020.duplicate_group_description: Isolate auction push-based bid refund can be blocked by blocklisted/reverting previous bidder address, permanently freezing the auction

OPS2-H003.title: Isolate Liquidation Fails to Clear Locker Address, Permanently Bricking Re-Deposited NFTs
OPS2-H003.duplicate_group_description: Isolate liquidation fails to clear tokenData.lockerAddr, causing liquidated NFTs to become permanently locked if re-deposited or if liquidator receives them with supplyAsCollateral=true

ECON-H011.title: Cross Liquidation ERC721 Remainder Credited as Supply Without Interest Rate Update for Collateral
ECON-H011.duplicate_group_description: Cross liquidation ERC721 remainDebtToLiquidate is credited as borrower supply via erc20IncreaseCrossSupply after updateInterestRates, which does not account for this additional supply in rate calculations

OPS2-H015.title: Untrusted ERC20 or ERC721 token behavior can lock the protocol due to strict balance-delta invariants on transfers
OPS2-H015.duplicate_group_description: Strict balance-delta invariant checks in VaultLogic transfer functions reject non-standard ERC20 tokens (fee-on-transfer, rebasing) despite documented support, causing operational DoS

TECH-H008.title: collectFeeToTreasury Reads and Zeroes accruedFee Before Index Update, Missing Newly Accrued Fees

TECH-H010.title: Cross Liquidation ERC721 Integer Division Truncation in Per-Item Debt Calculation

TECH-H011.title: Isolate Liquidation Passes Inflated liquidityAdded to updateInterestRates

TECH-H012.title: FlashLoanERC20 callback can re-enter lending/withdraw paths and manipulate interest rates using stale availableLiquidity (no nonReentrant + no liquidity accounting during loan)

TECH-H013.title: Isolate redeem decreases isolate debt for msgSender instead of the actual borrower, enabling debt forgiveness and breaking isolate-borrow conservation

TECH-H014.title: ERC721 flash loan ignores lockerAddr, allowing flash-loaning NFTs locked for yield/isolate workflows and breaking collateral lock guarantees

TECH-H015.title: Isolate liquidation transfers NFT to caller (msgSender) rather than highest bidder, enabling theft of auctioned NFTs using escrowed bid funds

TECH-H016.title: Native-token wrap helper uses IWETH.transferFrom(address(this), user, amount) (nonstandard), potentially breaking native deposit/repay/liquidate flows depending on WETH implementation

TECH-H018.title: ERC20 transfer out updates availableLiquidity before token transfer and relies on balance delta check; rebasing/blacklisting tokens can break solvency accounting or block withdrawals
